title: JSON Schema Validation
scenario: Given a JSON object, write a JSON schema that validates its structure. The schema should include specific constraints for each field and ensure the input JSON object conforms to the defined schema.
constraints: Must include at least 3 fields with specific constraints (e.g., string length, numeric range)

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the JSON schema covers all required fields in the input JSON object
Check if the schema constraints are accurately applied to the input JSON object
Assess the readability of the JSON schema
Evaluate the complexity of the JSON schema
